## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Impact

Describe user/developer impact and any hardware-control or safety implications.

## Validation

- [ ] `dart format --output=none --set-exit-if-changed lib test`
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile bridge/astrofield_bridge.py`
- [ ] Real hardware tested, or clearly marked as not hardware-tested

Hardware and versions used:

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No credentials, pairing tokens, private keys, public IPs or precise coordinates are included
- [ ] New network endpoints and privileged commands are documented

## Screenshots or logs

Add sanitized evidence where useful.
